g.text: Open-loop persistence replicates at all three scenes

text.style: font-size: 9.5px; font-family: 'DejaVu Sans', 'Bitstream Vera Sans', 'Computer Modern Sans Serif', 'Lucida Grande', 'Verdana', 'Geneva', 'Lucid', 'Arial', 'Helvetica', 'Avant Garde', sans-serif; text-anchor: start; fill: #52514e

g.text: Within the 4-chunk window: sc0's swap persists far above floor; at sc60/180 the persisting swap signal is floor-scale (paired deterministic contrasts — nonzero is real, but small). Random damage grows monotonically at every scene.
